purpose: Maintain a public-safe Anki Factory agent runtime for standardized medical deck generation.

allowed_in_repo: runtime wrappers that operate on explicit local inputs

roles.rule: Record explicit files and missing inputs before card writing.
Set card budget, subdecks, and source coverage without drafting cards.
Reject field drift, metadata leaks, weak jokbo explanation, and AI-smell phrasing.
Prepare review queue before approval or export.

hard_gates: approval and read-back before APKG export
no external write in public runtime smoke
